payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: White rectangular wall-mounted picture frame holding a printed sign with navy-blue text and horizontal blue border lines (the word 'VIRGINIA BEACH' is visible); frame appears slightly tilted and the crop is low-resolution/somewhat blurred but the entire frame is visible in the image, approximate distance ~1.0 m from camera.
